productDisplayName: Global Desi Women Yellow Printed Kurti
description: Composition Yellow and cream printed kurti made of 100% cotton, has a round, split v-neck, yoke with a vertical design in gold sequins and lace detailing, cap sleeves with sequins on the cuffs, and an inverted box pleat from the waist down Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean for the first two washes and thereafter hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Warm iron True to its name, global desi specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints with a modern cut to give a slimming silhouette, this Indo-Western kurti blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, shalwar, patialas or even leggings. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
